description: Create a custom Unit Group in openLCA named 'Beverage Packaging' defining a hierarchy of packaging units for a bottling line: 'Bottle' (Reference Unit, conversion factor 1.0), 'Case' (24.0 Bottles), and 'Pallet' (1920.0 Bottles). Create a Product Flow named 'Cola 500mL' using the 'Beverage Packaging' unit group with 'Bottle' as the reference unit. Create a Process named 'Cola Palletizing' with an output of 1.0 Pallet of the 'Cola 500mL' flow.
